outer_edge.text: Fused glass rises from the ground in twisted columns, {{color}} in the {{light_quality}} light. Something catches the light deeper in — metallic, rectangular.

choices.label: Pick a path through the glass columns.

inner_pocket.text: A pocket of open ground at the center holds the remnants of a pre-war monitoring station — melted into the glass but partially recoverable. Instruments and sealed cases half-embedded in the fused ground.

choices.label: Chip a sealed case free from the glass.

sealed_case.text: The case cracks open. Instruments wrapped in lead foil, still functional. Whoever left them here had the right idea.

glass_cut.text: A razor edge catches your leg. Blood soaks through immediately.

radiation_pocket.text: The glass here is still hot. Your dosimeter screams.
